items.name: Medieval Belt Accessory - Red Crossbow Hook
items.description: A hook to span the crossbow easier attached to the belt. When utilized the crossbowman must first attach the crossbow's string to the hook and then place his foot into the stirrup. The crossbow is then pulled down and the string is thereby moved into the crossbow nut's inlet.
